error_signature: if-node not operating correctly with boolean value
title: If node fails to operate correctly with boolean values
symptom: The if-node does not correctly evaluate the boolean value derived from a checkbox attribute, leading to unexpected workflow paths.
applies_when: Using an if-node to evaluate a boolean value
Boolean value derived from a checkbox in Notion node
not_this_if: Boolean value is correctly formatted without leading spaces
root_cause: Leading spaces in the boolean value can cause the if-node to misinterpret the input, preventing it from evaluating the condition as expected. This can occur when the value is parsed or retrieved from an external source like Notion.
fix_steps: Open the settings of the node that provides the boolean value
Remove any leading spaces from the boolean value
Test the if-node again to ensure it evaluates correctly
agent_instruction: Ensure there are no leading spaces in the boolean value before it reaches the if-node.
